"""

n=int(input())
a=list(map(int,input().split()))
a.sort()
ans=[]
for i in range(n):
    for j in range(i+1,n):
        if a[i]+a[j] not in a:
            ans.append(a[i])
            ans.append(a[j])
            break
    else:
        continue
    break
else:
    ans=a
print(len(ans))
print(*ans)
